label: SI-7(16)
title: Time Limit on Process Execution Without Supervision

prose.en: Prohibit processes from executing without supervision for more than {param:si-07.16_odp}.

guidance.en: Placing a time limit on process execution without supervision is intended to apply to processes for which typical or normal execution periods can be determined and situations in which organizations exceed such periods. Supervision includes timers on operating systems, automated responses, and manual oversight and response when system process anomalies occur.

prose.en: processes are prohibited from executing without supervision for more than {param:si-07.16_odp}.

objects.en: procedures addressing software and information integrity
system configuration settings and associated documentation
Organizational personnel responsible for software, firmware, and/or information integrity
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Software, firmware, and information integrity verification tools
mechanisms supporting and/or implementing time limits on process execution without supervision

guidelines.en: the maximum time period permitted for processes to execute without supervision is defined;

nist-withdrawal.label: SI-13(02)
nist-withdrawal.title: Time Limit on Process Execution Without Supervision
